commit.message:
[UX] Brain pill and space pill display improvements (#41)

* Initial plan

* feat: brain pill and space pill UX improvements

Issue A — Brain pills:
- Merge stat-pills row into tab row: counts now appear inline as
  badge bubbles on each tab button (e.g. Memories 42, Entities 18)
- Active tab badge adopts accent color for visual distinction
- Files shown as non-interactive count indicator at the right end
  of the tab bar (no dedicated Files tab, just a count)
- Add min-width + justify-content:center to global .tab class so
  all tab pills have uniform width and the row doesn't reflow on tab switch

Issue B — Space pills:
- Change .space-chip border-radius from 20px → 4px (square corners)
- Add min-width:110px for uniform alignment in space selector row
- Show total entry count (memories+entities+edges+chrono+files) below
  each space chip's id
- Pre-load stats for all spaces on ngOnInit so counts appear immediately
- Add spaceTotal() helper method on BrainComponent

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ythril-network/Ythril/sessions/58b492c6-f97c-4ce0-9b3e-3864b9d4cde6

Co-authored-by: MetalMMagic <118023869+MetalMMagic@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: files link to file manager, space chips scroll horizontally

- Convert Files count indicator in brain tab bar from a static span
  to a routerLink → /files?space=<spaceId> so it navigates directly
  to the file manager pre-selected on the active space
- Update FileManagerComponent.ngOnInit() to read ?space= query param
  and pre-select the requested space (falls back to first space if
  the id is unknown)
- Change .space-tabs from flex-wrap:wrap to overflow-x:auto so many
  spaces show a horizontal scrollbar instead of flowing to a new row

* Fix ADO PR mapping: use lastMergeCommit nested object instead of flat mergeCommitId (#150)

The Azure DevOps GitPullRequest API returns lastMergeCommit as a nested
GitCommitRef object (with commitId), not as a flat mergeCommitId string.
The previous code deserialized a non-existent mergeCommitId field, which
always returned null from real API calls, breaking commit-to-PR mapping
for all merge strategies (including squash merges).

- Add AzureDevOpsGitCommitRef record to model the nested commit reference
- Change AzureDevOpsPullRequest to deserialize LastMergeCommit (nested object)
- Add convenience MergeCommitId property to minimize downstream changes
- Update mock handler to emit lastMergeCommit: { commitId: ... } format

commit ebb1b7068c73a27f45e576a77ad5b5b3d7a93a64 used curl -s -u "$SONAR_TOKEN:"

fix: use white background for exported graphs and explicit line colors for GUI

- Export graphs always use white background regardless of current theme
- Added _get_export_palette() for fixed white-background color values
- Added _apply_export_theme() for consistent white theme on exported axes
- Gravity level and G-quality exports use LIGHT_ color tokens on white bg
- savefig calls include facecolor='#FFFFFF' to ensure PNG white background
- Watermark text uses fixed dark color for export readability
- GUI graph lines use explicit Colors.GRAPH_* tokens instead of matplotlib defaults
- Increased GUI linewidth from 0.8 to 1.0 for better visibility on dark backgrounds
